tasks.title: E2E pipeline smoke test (inbox drop → Supabase)
tasks.description: Verify full pipeline: drop test file into docs/inbox/, trigger inbox-ingest.yml manually, confirm row in Supabase inbox_entries. Requires SUPABASE env vars.

tasks.title: Verify Supabase env vars are set
tasks.description: Check that NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY are set in next-forge/.env and accessible to CI. Check docs/supabase-setup.md.

tasks.title: Phase 5: Knowledge Query UI in next-forge
tasks.description: Scaffold apps/app/app/(authenticated)/knowledge/ — /knowledge page (search + recent), /knowledge/[id] (entry detail), /knowledge/catalogue (skills browser). Use TanStack Query. Follow existing generative-ui/ pattern.

tasks.title: Register skillsh-mcp in .mcp.json
tasks.description: Add .tools/skillsh-mcp/dist/index.js to .mcp.json so Cursor/Copilot can use search_skills, popular_skills, skill_details, install_command tools directly from the IDE.
